name: Sawbones
flavor: High Noon — new archetype. The frontier doc: no real fight in him, fragile, but keeps the outfit on its feet. Mirrors the Medic worked example.

specialAction.name: Patch 'Em Up
specialAction.summary: Remove up to 2 Lead total, split between this Hand and one allied Hand within yellow range. No valid target needed.

effects.text: Remove up to 1 Lead from an ally in yellow range.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, remove 1 extra Lead from an allied Hand within yellow range.
